## Checklist

- [ ] Ran the full local gate: `scripts/run_ci_local.sh` (lint · unit · backend · e2e)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the behavior that could regress
- [ ] Updated docs where behavior, config, or commands changed (README / CONTRIBUTING / docs/)
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or personal data in the diff
